Your body. Your plan. Your results.
Not a generic plan. A plan built from your body stats, your goal, your diet, and your lifestyle — recalculated every month as you progress.

Thank you for joining Social Ninjas Fit. Before we begin, let's set you up for success.
How to add the app to your home screen:
🍎 iPhone (Safari):
Tap the Share icon at the bottom of Safari, then scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
🤖 Android (Chrome):
Tap the 3 dots menu at the top right of Chrome, then tap "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
